text:
[1]    12477 segmentation fault  nautilus
amw@t430 ~> 

It happens again (after downloading some pictures (jpg and webp extensions) when entering the ~/Download folder today.

It doesn't happen entering this folder using Nemo or Caja.

Today I did a doas pkg update and doas pkg upgrade (13.1 latest repo). There were some new packages but I didn't see a relation with Nautilus.
